--- 
title: "Words Explained"
listing: 
    contents: 
        - "**/*.qmd"
    type: grid
    sort:
        - "title asc"
    image-placeholder: coming_soon.png
    grid-item-align: left
    fields:
        - title
        - subtitle
        - description
        - image
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

<!-- ::: {#hero-banner .column-screen}
::: {.grid .column-page}
::: {.headline .g-col-lg-6 .g-col-12 .g-col-md-12}
::: {.h1 role="heading" aria-level="1"}
Gallery
::: -->
